setup: 40 FC1 Lv.6.0 Lancer attacker Alpaca versus 1 ordinary Lv.1.0 Infantry defender Colonel Mueller with Gatot.

threshold_pair.target: ordinary no-FC T1 Infantry with Gatot

turn_inference.cadence: King's Bestowal triggers each time Gatot's Infantry attacks
assumptions: For these controlled Gatot Infantry tests, Martin treats King's Bestowal's trigger count as the exact battle-round count.
A 1,500 trigger count is treated as the visible timeout/cap case for the failed threshold attempts.

stats_capture.notes: All three troop classes and all four stat rows were visible in the supplied Stat Bonuses screenshot.

defender.name: Colonel Mueller
defender.troop_stat_reference: wos_sim/troop_catalog.py::_TIER_ROWS :: ordinary Infantry T1, no Fire Crystal

composition.troop_stat_reference: wos_sim/troop_catalog.py::_TIER_ROWS :: ordinary Infantry T1, no Fire Crystal

stats_capture.notes: Colonel Mueller's defender stat rows are visible in the supplied batch stat screenshots; Gatot's T1 Infantry is ordinary/no-FC.

hero_skills.name: Golden Guard
hero_skills.effect: Gatot commands his troops with imperial guard tactics, increasing his Infantry's Defense by 6%.

hero_skills.name: King's Bestowal
hero_skills.effect: The great kings blesses Gatot's Infantry, granting Infantry a Shield with protection equal to Attack*6% each time they attack, for 1 turn.

notes: Attacker is Alpaca, displayed in-game with the Chinese Alpaca name, on the red/left side at X:747 Y:475.
Defender is Colonel Mueller on the blue/right side at X:745 Y:473.
Alpaca fields 40 FC1 Lv.6.0 Lancer; this is not a normal non-FC troop row.
Colonel Mueller fields 1 ordinary Lv.1.0 Infantry with Gatot; Gatot's Infantry is not Fire Crystal.
Gatot Golden Guard triggered 1 time; King's Bestowal triggered 1500 times; visible third Gatot skill triggered 1 time.
Skill kills are displayed as dashes and recorded as zero for the Gatot skill rows.
Observed FC1 Lv.6 attacker power is 21 per severely injured troop in this screenshot set.

No battle-overview screenshot was supplied for this report. Attacker injured count is inferred from -63 power loss divided by the observed FC1 Lv.6 troop power of 21. Lightly injured and survivor counts are left unknown.

_extraction.extracted_by: Codex local visual transcription from pasted screenshots
manual_overrides: Martin specified Gatot's T1 Infantry is ordinary/no-FC.
Martin specified Alpaca Lancer and Marksman are FC1; unit cards show Lv.6.0 and observed power loss supports FC1 Lv.6 attacker power of 21.
The 22/21 pair is labelled as Marksman from the visible hat troop card; the 41/40 pair is labelled as Lancer from the visible armored troop card.
Gatot skill names/descriptions use Martin previously supplied fixed Gatot reference.

suspicions: Report 4 overview was not supplied; some casualty fields are inferred or unknown.
